vocab.example: Wearing a watch is often seen as a hallmark of professional etiquette, demonstrating that you value both your time and that of others.

vocab.meaning: sự linh hoạt về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I believe a watch is essential due to its aesthetic versatility, as it can effortlessly complement both formal attire and casual outfits.
A mechanical watch provides a tangible connection to craftsmanship that a digital smartphone simply cannot replicate.

vocab.meaning: cách thức không gây phiền hà/kín đáo
vocab.example: Glancing at your wrist is an unobtrusive way to keep track of the duration of a meeting without appearing rude or distracted.

vocab.meaning: công nghệ dư thừa/không còn cần thiết
vocab.example: Some argue that wristwatches are redundant technology in the smartphone era, yet their enduring popularity suggests otherwise.
